Declaring a //fabrik:job or //fabrik:cron handler makes the binary host the
jobs worker: the generator emits a JobWorker entrypoint that calls jobs.Run
and drains it when the context is canceled. The runtime config is an ordinary
provider (here returning jobs.RuntimeConfig); with none it defaults to a zero
jobs.RuntimeConfig.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/jobs v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/jobs => JOBSDIR
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- shared/shared.go --
package shared

import (
	"context"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/jobs"
)

//fabrik:provider
func NewJobStore() (jobs.Store, error) { return jobs.NewMemoryStore(), nil }

type Welcome struct{ UserID int64 }

//fabrik:job
func SendWelcome(ctx context.Context, m Welcome) error { return nil }

//fabrik:provider
func Worker() (jobs.RuntimeConfig, error) {
	return jobs.RuntimeConfig{Worker: jobs.WorkerConfig{Concurrency: 4}, RunScheduler: true}, nil
}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"context"
	"errors"
	"os"
	"os/signal"
	"syscall"
	"time"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/jobs"

	"app/shared"
)

func run() (err error) {
	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
	defer cancel()
	defer func() {
		if errors.Is(err, context.Canceled) && ctx.Err() != nil {
			err = nil
		}
	}()
	sigc := make(chan os.Signal, 2)
	signal.Notify(sigc, os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
	defer signal.Stop(sigc)
	go func() {
		<-sigc
		cancel()
		<-sigc
		os.Exit(1)
	}()

	// Providers
	sharedJobsStore, err := shared.NewJobStore()
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	jobsManager, err := jobs.New(sharedJobsStore, jobs.Config{})
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}

	sharedJobsRuntimeConfig, err := shared.Worker()
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}

	// Register
	// Jobs
	if err := jobs.Register[shared.Welcome](jobsManager, "shared.Welcome"); err != nil {
		return err
	}
	if err := jobs.On[shared.Welcome](jobsManager, "SendWelcome", func(c jobs.Context, m shared.Welcome) error {
		return shared.SendWelcome(c, m)
	}); err != nil {
		return err
	}

	errc := make(chan error, 1)
	go func() { errc <- JobWorker(ctx, jobsManager, sharedJobsRuntimeConfig) }()
	var result error
	for range 1 {
		if e := <-errc; e != nil && !errors.Is(e, context.Canceled) && result == nil {
			result = e
			cancel()
		}
	}
	return result
}

func JobWorker(ctx context.Context, jobsManager *jobs.Manager, sharedJobsRuntimeConfig jobs.RuntimeConfig) error {
	drain, err := jobs.Run(ctx, jobsManager, sharedJobsRuntimeConfig)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	<-ctx.Done()
	drainCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 30*time.Second)
	defer cancel()
	return drain(drainCtx)
}
